mandate: Build partner database schema, RLS policies, server actions for partner CRUD, referral link generation
keyFindings: One partner model with role-based views is the right architecture — partner_type enum differentiates without separate tables
parent_partner_id enables church hierarchy (church has multiple officiants) without a separate join table
RLS uses a SECURITY DEFINER helper function get_partner_id_for_user() for the referrals policy — cleaner than inline subqueries
whatWorked: Following the circle_of_care migration pattern for RLS. Referral code generation using crypto.getRandomValues with ambiguous character exclusion (0/O/1/I/L) produces human-readable codes.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The partner-auth agent should use the placeholder user_id (all zeros) set by invitePartner to detect unclaimed invites. The referral code is generated at invite time, not at claim time.
spiritContribution: Laid the data foundation for the entire B2B2C channel. Every other partner agent depends on this schema.
